chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-1949 of 2019 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on M.A. No.847/2020 For orders on office objection For hearing of main case 05.09.2023 Petitioner present in person. Mr. Parkash Kumar, advocate for respondent No.5(i). Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri AAG Sindh ----- Petitioner has appeared in person and submits that he would argue the case himself. Mr. Parkash has presented an order of the Additional Deputy Commissioner-I Badin dated 03.11.2020. This petition was filed to seek direction for the disposal of the revenue appeal that has been pending which has now been decided. The petition has served its purpose. In case the petitioner is aggrieved of the findings and reasoning provided in the order, he may pursue his remedy available to him under the law. Copy of the order has been provided by Mr. Parkash to the petitioner who is appearing in person. Petition is disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
